title: BorrowerFinancialData
description: Structured borrower financial data extracted from multimodal input (SMS text, ledger photo, voice note).

source_type.description: The type of input source from which the financial data was extracted.

daily_revenue_estimate.description: Estimated daily revenue of the borrower in Indian Rupees (INR).

revenue_variance.description: The level of variance or volatility in the borrower's daily revenue.

payment_consistency.description: The level of consistency in the borrower's payment behavior.

confidence_score.description: The model's self-reported confidence score for the extraction, ranging from 0 (lowest) to 1 (highest).

anomaly_flags.description: A list of flagged anomalies detected in the data (e.g., 'revenue_spike', 'narrative_mismatch'). Empty if no anomalies are detected.

raw_extracted_text.description: The raw text read/transcribed by the model from the source input, used for audit and debugging.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 formatted timestamp of when the extraction was performed.

borrower_session_id.description: Identifier linking multiple extraction records (SMS, ledger, voice) to the same borrower assessment session.
